results.title: Weighing scale using HX711 and ESP32 for remote weight monitoring (by ...
results.snippet: An ESP32 microcontroller can be used to build a weighing scale by interfacing with a load cell sensor and using its built-in analog-to-digital converter (ADC) to convert the sensor's output into a weight measurement.
